purpose: Defines declarative network-latency profiles applied by the benchmark suite before workload execution.

fieldNotes.enabled: false means no runtime netem mutation is applied, but a manifest is still written for traceability.
fieldNotes.target: Describes which Kubernetes nodes receive host-network netem configuration.
fieldNotes.networkEmulation: Defines delay, jitter, packet loss and network interface parameters.
fieldNotes.implementation: The runtime implementation uses a privileged, short-lived Kubernetes Job per target node. The provider tool remains application-agnostic.
